fields.name: Shop Calendar Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the shop calendar code that the shop calendar working day entry refers to.
To select a shop calendar code in the Shop Calendar table, click the field.
You must set up the shop calendar first.

fields.name: Day
fields.tooltip: Specifies your working days of the week.

fields.name: Work Shift Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the work shift that this working day refers to.

fields.name: Starting Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies the starting time of the shift for this working day.

fields.name: Ending Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ending time of the shift for this working day.
